description: Professional music generation prompt template for AI music models (MusicGen, AudioCraft, Suno, etc.)
dimensions: genre_and_subgenre: be specific (e.g. 'neo-classical ambient' not just 'classical')
key_and_mode: tonal centre and mode (e.g. D minor, Lydian, pentatonic) if relevant
tempo: exact BPM and feel (e.g. '72 BPM, half-time feel')
instrumentation: list instruments with articulation (e.g. 'pizzicato cello', 'breathy flute', 'distorted Rhodes')
dynamic_arc: how energy and density evolve (e.g. 'sparse intro pp, builds to full ensemble ff at 1:30')
texture: sparse / layered / dense, stereo width, reverb character (intimate / large hall / infinite)
emotional_target: the precise feeling the music must create in the listener
structural_markers: intro / main theme / bridge / climax / outro with approximate durations
mix_reference_levels: e.g. 'bass at -6 dBFS, pads at -12 dBFS'
artist_or_soundtrack_reference: concrete anchor (e.g. 'Hans Zimmer — Interstellar OST', 'Nils Frahm — Says')
examples: Neo-classical ambient, D minor, Lydian inflections. 68 BPM, 4/4, half-time feel. Instrumentation: solo prepared piano (close-mic'd, slightly detuned), bowed cello sul ponticello, sparse sub-bass drone, high-frequency granular texture. Dynamic arc: opens pp with solo piano motif, cello enters at 0:20 pp, full texture builds to mp by 1:00, sustained mp plateau, gradual decrescendo to silence. Texture: sparse, wide stereo reverb (large hall, 3s tail), intimate piano in centre. Emotional target: melancholic wonder, the feeling of standing at the edge of the ocean at dusk. Structural: 20s intro, 2:30 main theme, 30s fade outro. Reference: Nils Frahm 'Says' meets Ólafur Arnalds 'Near Light'.

Cinematic orchestral action, E minor. 138 BPM, 4/4 with syncopated cross-rhythms. Instrumentation: low brass stabs (trombone + tuba), taiko drums with room reverb, aggressive ostinato strings (col legno), distorted electric cello, sub-bass hits on beat 1. Dynamic arc: cold open with single brass hit, builds relentlessly over 16 bars to full ensemble fortissimo, no release. Texture: dense, mono-compatible, punchy. Emotional target: visceral urgency, adrenaline. Structural: 4s cold open, 45s main cue, hard cut ending. Reference: Hans Zimmer 'Inception — Time' intro energy, Junkie XL 'Batman v Superman' brass palette.
